summary: Verified ADR 0192 from branch commit `40df2935` against the live platform state by rendering the class-aware capacity report with and without live metrics, checking preview and recovery admission paths, and confirming the live preview pool occupancy through the fixture manager. No server-side mutable replay step was required because ADR 0192 is a controller-side policy, reporting, and admission change.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_capacity_report.py tests/test_fixture_manager.py tests/test_restore_verification.py tests/test_standby_capacity.py tests/test_validate_ephemeral_vmid.py -q` returned `24 passed`, and `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate` returned `Repository data models OK`.

`make capacity-report NO_LIVE_METRICS=true` rendered the three class summaries with `ha_reserved` 12 GB RAM / 6 vCPU / 128 GB disk, `recovery_reserved` 4 GB RAM / 2 vCPU / 48 GB disk, and `preview_burst` 20 GB RAM / 8 vCPU / 100 GB disk.
`make capacity-report` completed successfully from the branch worktree and reported `Metrics source: ssh+influx` while preserving the same class summaries.

`uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/capacity_report.py --model config/capacity-model.json --check-class-request --requester-class preview --proposed-change 4,2,32` returned `approved: true` with `primary_class: preview_burst` and no borrowing.

`uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/capacity_report.py --model config/capacity-model.json --check-class-request --requester-class restore-verification --declared-drill --proposed-change 4,2,48` returned `approved: true` with `primary_class: recovery_reserved`.
`uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/fixture_manager.py list --no-refresh-health` returned `No active fixtures`, so `preview_burst` occupancy was zero at verification time.

`./scripts/validate_repo.sh data-models` still fails on the unrelated mainline issue `ansible-scope-runner error: playbook 'playbooks/proxmox-staging-bridge.yml' does not define imports or a leaf catalog entry`.

notes: This receipt records a branch-local live verification from `codex/ws-0192-live-apply`, not a merge-to-main release.
The platform version remains `0.130.31` until a synchronized `main` replay updates the protected integration surfaces.
Merge-to-main still needs `README.md`, `VERSION`, `changelog.md`, and `versions/stack.yaml` updated from the integrated branch state.
